ddls:
CREATE TABLE "imaging_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the imaging method used */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the imaging (e.g., in mm) */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* Chain identifier for the imaging entry */,
  "positions" TEXT /* Positions related to the imaging entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the entry */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the imaging */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination linked to this entry */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the imaging was performed */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* Status of the imaging entry (e.g., scheduled, completed, reviewed) */,
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist who reviewed the entry */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Summary of the diagnosis based on the imaging */,
  "report_generated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a report has been generated for this entry */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the imaging entry based on resolution and other metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_entries_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_entries_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES imaging_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_entries_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_entries_radiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiologist_id") REFERENCES radiologists ("radiologist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_entries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the imaging method (e.g., X-Ray) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imaging method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of performing the imaging method */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration (in minutes) for the imaging method */,
  "recommended_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for the imaging method (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID number */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the technician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the technician */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician (e.g., X-Ray, MRI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "examinations" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each examination */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the examination */,
  "exam_type" TEXT /* Type of examination (e.g., routine, urgent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the examination */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the examination (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "indications" TEXT /* Indications for the examination (e.g., suspected lung cancer) */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* Name of the physician who requested the examination */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration (in minutes) for the examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chains" (
  "chain_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the imaging chain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imaging chain */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the imaging chain */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the imaging chain (number of patients per day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolution_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., mm, pixels) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric to be considered acceptable */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the metric in overall quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging entry being reviewed */,
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist conducting the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the radiologist */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was performed */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis (e.g., 0.85) */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a follow-up is needed */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up appointment, if needed */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes by the radiologist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_radiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiologist_id") REFERENCES radiologists ("radiologist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES imaging_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiologists" (
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radiologist */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the radiologist */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the radiologist */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification details of the radiologist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the radiologist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the radiologist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the radiologist (e.g., Neuroradiology, Musculoskeletal) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the radiologist */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the radiologist (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radiologist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the appointment */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the examination scheduled */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician scheduled for the imaging */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the appointment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the appointment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or special instructions for the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES examinations ("exam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment (e.g., X-Ray Machine) */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service performed on the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, in repair) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging entry associated with this usage */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  "usage_start" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was first used */,
  "usage_end" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of equipment usage (in minutes) */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., diagnostic, therapeutic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES imaging_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., technician, radiologist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the role entails */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view patient records, edit imaging entries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
